findings.title: Generic tool name can shadow trusted tools
findings.detail: Tool "search" uses a generic high-value name. When multiple servers load together, this can intercept calls meant for a trusted server.

labels.name: get_form144_notices
labels.description: Get SEC Form 144 filings — notices of proposed sale of restricted/controlled securities by insiders. Filed before selling, these signal upcoming insider sales. Complements Form 4 (post-trade) with pre-trade intent.

labels.name: sec_list_filings
labels.description: List an entity's SEC filings from EDGAR (most recent first), each with its accession number. Provide the company's CIK (use search or get_stock_profile to find it). Returns accession numbers to pass to sec_get_filing_index / sec_get_filing_document.

labels.name: sec_get_filing_index
labels.description: Enumerate every file in a single SEC filing (primary document, exhibits, images, XBRL, the full .txt submission). Pass a file name from here to sec_get_filing_document.

labels.name: sec_get_filing_document
labels.description: Get a source document from a SEC filing, served by ko.io. Returns a ko.io LINK to the rendered document (open in a browser) plus, optionally, an extracted text excerpt. Never returns the whole file — for full content, open the link or request a specific section.

labels.name: get_stock_financials
labels.description: Get quarterly or annual financial statements for a company (revenue, net income, EPS, margins, cash flow, debt ratios) from SEC 10-K/10-Q filings.

labels.name: get_treasury_yields
labels.description: Get U.S. Treasury yield curve data — daily yields for maturities from 1-month to 30-year. Essential for understanding interest rate environment and yield curve shape.

labels.name: get_fed_rates
labels.description: Get daily U.S. policy and money-market interest rates as a markdown table: Effective Fed Funds Rate, SOFR, Prime Rate, and benchmark Treasury yields (3M, 2Y, 10Y, 30Y) per date, newest first. Use for monetary-policy questions like 'Where is the Fed funds rate now?' or 'How has SOFR moved this quarte

labels.name: get_economic_indicators
labels.description: Get U.S. economic indicators from BLS — CPI (inflation), PPI (producer prices), Non-farm Payrolls (employment), Unemployment Rate, JOLTS. Filter by category.

labels.name: get_ftd_data
labels.description: Get SEC Failures-to-Deliver (FTD) data for a stock. High FTD quantities may indicate naked short selling or settlement issues.

labels.name: get_financial_stress
labels.description: Get the OFR Financial Stress Index — a daily indicator of stress in global financial markets. Values above 0 indicate above-average stress.

labels.name: get_crypto_exposure
labels.description: Get a market-wide summary of institutional exposure to US spot crypto ETFs (Bitcoin ETF complex: IBIT, FBTC, GBTC, etc.) from the latest quarter of SEC 13F filings. Returns total institutional USD held, quarter-over-quarter change, and a per-ETF breakdown (holders, USD, QoQ).

labels.name: get_crypto_holders
labels.description: List institutional investors holding US spot crypto ETFs (Bitcoin ETF complex), ranked by total USD held, from the latest quarter of SEC 13F filings. Optionally filter to holders of a specific ETF via the `product` parameter (e.g. 'IBIT').

labels.name: get_crypto_holder
labels.description: Get one institution's spot crypto-ETF holdings (Bitcoin ETF complex): its per-ETF positions in the latest filed quarter (shares, USD, QoQ change, action) plus its rank among all crypto-ETF holders. Use a CIK number (find it with get_crypto_holders or the search tool).

findings.title: Generic tool name can shadow trusted tools
findings.detail: Tool "search" uses a generic high-value name. When multiple servers load together, this can intercept calls meant for a trusted server.

findings.title: Lethal trifecta: untrusted input + private data + external sink
findings.detail: Server "mcp" exposes tools that together enable an exfiltration flow. Untrusted content: get_form144_notices, get_ftd_data · Private data: list_institutions, search, sec_get_filing_index, sec_get_filing_document · Public sink: get_institution_holdings, get_stock_activity, get_form144_notices.

evidence.snippet: Untrusted content: get_form144_notices, get_ftd_data · Private data: list_institutions, search, sec_get_filing_index, sec_get_filing_document · Public sink: get_institution_holdings, get_stock_activity, get_form144_notices

findings.remediation: Do not co-install these capabilities under one trust boundary; an injected comment/email can steer the model to exfiltrate via the sink tool.
